jokes.title: Which is the most used tank on the battlefield?
I have a few more tank jokes...
Knock knock!
jokes.body: Who's there? Tank. Tank who? You're welcome!

jokes.title: Why don't tanks ever get lost?
Why are tanks always calm under pressure?
jokes.body: They have thick armor and zero depression.

jokes.title: What do tanks eat for breakfast?
What do you call a tank that tells jokes?
Why don't tanks ever forget anything?
Why don't tanks play hide and seek
jokes.body: They always stand out in the field.

jokes.title: The tank was originally invented to clear a way for the infantry in the teeth of machine-gun fire. Now it is the infantry who will have to clear a way for the tanks.
Why did the tank get promoted?
jokes.body: Because it has high caliber skills.
